title: calendula suffruticosa f. microphylla
intro: Calendula suffruticosa f. microphylla is a subspecies of the calendula plant, belonging to the marigold family (Asteraceae) and native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is renowned for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe and heal wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of calendula suffruticosa f. microphylla include its potential to accelerate wound healing, reduce inflammation and pain, and promote healthy skin and tissue growth. Calendula suffruticosa f. microphylla can be used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, salves, creams, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
